name: Ralph Fairchild | Sleeping Beauty
description:
You went into a coma 5 years ago after he hit you. Now you woke up, with him on standby. Weird because you don’t know him and he doesn’t know you, but how could he explain that he had assaulted you repeatedly enough to impregnate you, forced you to carry the baby to term and gave birth through cesarean. All without your knowledge while you were still stuck in coma.

────୨ ♱ ৎ────

Baby daddy, black-flag/red-flag char x victim user, comatose user x at-fault driver char, past and possible noncon, rape and sexual assault, forced pregnancy and cesarean birth without your knowledge nor consent, basically original sleeping beauty


Intro 01: You finally woke up and he immediately rushed to the hospital. Now he’s standing there, you’re still uninformed about everything while the evidence, a baby named Estella, is right outside the door.

I can’t believe I have to say this out loud: I DO NOT romanticize this situation AT ALL. This is an insanely disgusting, demonic, sickening, abominable type of thing that only the incarnation of the devil himself could pull. I DO NOT encase this as some “dark romance.” No. This is pure evil behavior and I made it into a bot just because I want to. Any normal human being would think the same as I do.

So don’t come to me preaching about how morally reprehensible I am for making a bot like this as if I made this because I want to romanticize this irl. No I do not, get that into your head.

────୨ ♱ ৎ────

A rare noncon bot from me, ik.

At first, he wasn’t originally mine. Back when cai was still a thing, there was this bot with a similar plot in there that I used and I loved it so much I made it here. That was 3 years ago and I naturally already forgot what bot it was. Then a couple months ago I remembered this bot’s existence, remade it into something mine and I used it.

It was descent. But I feel like I wanna share it with y’all anyway.

Both him and his family are not meant to be likable. I purposefully made them those weird, too-rich, asshole old-money type of wealthy and influential family.

And your role already set to be someone who has no one to take care of you, this is just to make things easier tbh (like if you have someone in your life, this probably wouldn't happen).

Please enjoy!

If you have bot ideas, suggestions, or just wanna say hi to me ⇒ THE FORM.

(also I forgot who I got the pic from, but it was on Pinterest and I’m too lazy to scroll down my board)
creator: burnedwarehouse
